As for 20th Century Studios, the Disney-owned company is keeping busy with plans for multiple Predator movies, Avatar 3, and another Apes movie potentially set for 2027."},{"url":"https://nexuspointnews.com/exclusive-michael-sarnoski-eyed-to-direct-the-alien-romulus-sequel/","title":"EXCLUSIVE: Michael Sarnoski Eyed to Direct the ‘Alien: Romulus’ Sequel","content":"EXCLUSIVE: Michael Sarnoski (A Quiet Place: Day One) is being considered to direct the highly anticipated sequel to Alien: Romulus, Nexus Point News has learned.
